description.value: Price 8,000 gp; Slot none; CL 12th; Weight â; Aura strong transmutation DESCRIPTION This brilliant, deep violet crystal is perfectly cut in the shape of a five-pointed star. EFFECTS The gem grants its bearer a swim speed of 30 feet. When inserted into a wayfinder, it allows the bearer to breathe water for up to 10 minutes per day (in 1-minute increments). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells touch of the sea; Special creator must be at least 12th level
